title: Metals fall as Beijing efforts to boost economic growth disappoint
section_path: Metals fall as Beijing efforts to boost economic growth disappoint
section_path_text: Metals fall as Beijing efforts to boost economic growth disappoint
summary:
Main
Disappointment over China's stimulus measures weighed on sentiment in metal markets. Strong haven demand continues to support precious metals. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-10-18 104108.png | assets/2024-10-18_metals-fall-as-beijing-efforts-to-boost-economic-growth-disappoint_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_42e1aeeb14ce.png

Market Commentary
Iron ore futures slumped after the latest measures to support China's property sector failed to shore up confidence.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Disappointment over China's stimulus measures weighed on sentiment in metal markets. Strong haven demand continues to support precious metals.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Iron ore futures slumped after the latest measures to support China's property sector failed to shore up confidence. China's Housing Minister, Ni Hong, said his department will expand a program to support the completion of unfinished housing projects to CNY4tn.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary:
A stronger USD has failed to halt gold's rise in recent weeks
